So for SID, SID is the most complicated account of the three content-wise.
So we have like 15 pieces of content weekly, five are editorial blocks, five are glossary pages, and five are tilt pages.
For the editorials, we have two pipelines.

And like I explained here, the main difference is the tone, because SIT wants to be like this very approachable ITSM, like they want to sound human, but then like when we're working on both topics, like this was actually our suggestion, because they weren't getting as much traffic as we would expect.
So we were like, can we actually have like even technical content that will, you know, just sound very expert.
